meta.name: ABILITY_SURF_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A water spell that deals damage and knockback in a large area.
A water spell that deals more damage and knockback in a larger area.

meta.name: ABILITY_BOLT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A lightning bolt that has a 25% chance to Stun.
A stronger lightning bolt that has a 50% chance to Stun.

meta.name: ABILITY_FIREBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A fireblast that inflicts Burn 2 in an area.
A more damaging fireblast that inflicts Burn 3 in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_FROSTBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes the first unit it hits.
Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes every unit it hits.

meta.name: ABILITY_ENERGYBLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A high damage spell that hits a single target.
A high damage spell that hits a single target and deals extra damage equal to your [img:int].

meta.name: ABILITY_MAGICMISSILE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.
Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss. Emit 3 Sparkles.

meta.name: ABILITY_WALLOFFIRE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A fire spell that inflicts Burn 1 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.
A fire spell that damages, inflicts Burn 3 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.

meta.name: ABILITY_HYPERBEAM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.

meta.name: ABILITY_METEORSTORM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a large area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.
Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a larger area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

meta.name: ABILITY_MEGABLAST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal high damage in a cone.
Deal high damage in a larger cone.

meta.name: ABILITY_CHILL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Slow on a unit.
Inflict Slow on units in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_ENLARGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Get big.
Get big.

meta.name: ABILITY_WINDSLASH_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_ABSORB_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP.
Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP. Excess healing is converted into [img:shield].

meta.name: ABILITY_MANAMELD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give all of your mana to a unit in range 3.
Give all of your mana plus 2 to a unit.

meta.desc_resolved: Give 2 mana to a unit.
Give 4 mana to a unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_TELEFRAG_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_CHAOSTELEPORT_NAME

Teleport to a random tile. Deal damage to units adjacent to the tile you teleport to.

meta.name: ABILITY_GUST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 1 space.
Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 3 spaces, at infinite range.

meta.name: ABILITY_BLIZZARD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 1 that inflicts Slow and has a 15% chance to freeze.
Deal more ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 10 that inflicts Slow and has a 25% chance to freeze.

meta.name: ABILITY_INFERNO_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal fire damage and inflict Burn 3 to all units in a large circle around you.
Deal more fire damage and inflict Burn 5 to all units in a large circle around you.

meta.name: ABILITY_THUNDERBURST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot lightning bolts in eight directions with a 15% chance to Stun.
Shoot stronger lightning bolts in eight directions with a 25% chance to Stun.

meta.name: ABILITY_DEALWITHTHEDEVIL_NAME

Injure yourself, then restore 15 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_DEALWITHTHEDEVIL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Injure yourself, then restore all your mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_FORBIDDENFLAME_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Heavily damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…

meta.name: ABILITY_FORBIDDENFLOOD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Knock back and damage all enemies, then flood the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

meta.desc_resolved: Create a whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHATTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that instantly kills frozen units. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHATTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A spell that instantly kills frozen units in an area. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

Strike all enemies with lightning, inflicting Stun. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…

meta.name: ABILITY_FIREBOLT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 1 and has a 15% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.
Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 2 and has a 30% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.

meta.name: ABILITY_ICICLETASER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot an ice/electric bolt in a straight line. It inflicts Slow 2, has a 25% chance to Stun and a 25% chance to Freeze.

meta.name: ABILITY_FREEZERBURN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 2, Slow 2 and Knockback 2 on all units around you.
Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 3, Slow 3 and Knockback 3 on all units around you in a larger area.

meta.name: ABILITY_CORRUPT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage.
Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage and emit a Sparkle.

meta.name: ABILITY_JOLT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 1 damage and knocks the unit it hits 3 tiles in the direction it's facing.
Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 2 damage and knocks the unit it hits 6 tiles in the direction it's facing.

meta.name: ABILITY_SMOLDER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to a unit in range.

Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to any unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_FIRESURGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn.
A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn. Starts stronger.

meta.name: ABILITY_ICESURGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
An ice spell that increases its range and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.
[s:.7](Current turns: {v0})[/s]

An ice spell that increases its range, damage, and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.

meta.name: ABILITY_LIGHTNINGSURGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 2 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.
An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 3 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.

meta.name: ABILITY_CRESHENDO_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell resets after you cast it.

This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell loses half its boosts after you cast it.

meta.name: ABILITY_DIVIDE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Lose Damage equal to half of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

Lose Damage equal to 1/3rd of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_FORBIDDENFROST_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 5 Damage to enemies and heal each ally 5 HP.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 10 Damage to enemies and fully heal each ally.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_BLACKMAGIC_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_BLACKMAGIC_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost and gain All Stats Up 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_TEACH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Reduce the cost of another unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn.
Reduce the cost of a unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn. This can target yourself.

meta.name: ABILITY_HOMINGBLASTS_NAME

Shoot 4 Magic Missiles at random enemies.

meta.name: ABILITY_REPLICATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: The next spell you or another unit casts is cast twice.

meta.name: ABILITY_TRIATTACK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A Fire / Ice / Electric spell that inflicts Burn 1, Slow 1, and has a 5% chance to inflict Stun.
